nasb.text: But these enemies of mine, who did not want me to reign over them, bring them here and slay them in my presence.’ ”

esv.text: But as for these enemies of mine, who did not want me to reign over them, bring them here and slaughter them before me.’”

cnv.text: 至於我那些仇敵，就是不願意我作王統治他們的，把他們拉到這裡來，在我面前殺掉！’”

ccb.text: 至于那些反对我做王的仇敌，把他们捉回来，在我面前处决。’”

csbs.text: 不过我的这些敌人，就是不要我做王统治他们的人，把他们带到这里来，在我面前杀掉！”
